creator: exploringlondon
caption:
For a city that so many call expensive, there are so many free things to do! Here are 8 of our favourites:

1. Crossrail Place Roof Garden - one of London’s largest roof gardens, free to walk in without a ticket.
📍 Canary Wharf @canarywharflondon 

2. Sir John Soane’s Museum @soanemuseum - the stunning former home of one of the greatest English architects, now an absolutely fascinating museum.
📍Holborn

3. Free Mini golf that pops up every now and then, perfect in the sunshine!
📍 Canary Wharf

4. The @tate Modern lates are such a fun way to experience art, music, workshops, films and more, at one of the best museums in the world, completely for free! 
📍 @bankside_london 

5. The Post Building rooftop is pretty underrated, it’s free to go up and doesn’t need pre-booking! You just need to show ID to go through for incredible 9th floor views and pretty pink spring blossoms!
📍 New Oxford Street

6. Can’t have a free London guide without the incredible @natural_history_museum which has just broken the all-time record for footfall at a UK museum or gallery, with over 7 million visitors in 2025!
📍 South Kensington @discover.south.kensington 

7. @outernetglobal, a free immersive space with incredible floor to ceiling screens that are the world’s largest, highest-resolution wraparound LED screens!
📍 Tottenham Court Road

8. The Royal Exchange @rexlondon is a Grade-I listed building that is now home to a collection of restaurants, eateries and shops.
📍 Bank
